footer.description: A premium digital experience for parents, coaches, students, and academy management.

hero.title: Build Champions with a Smarter Sports Academy Platform.
hero.description: AspireX Sports Academy delivers a modern UAE-ready experience for parents, coaches, admins, subscriptions, attendance, player progress, and KPI dashboards.

programsSection.title: Sports programs built for every age and skill level.
programsSection.description: Give parents a clear way to choose the right program by age, location, level, schedule, and price.

football.title: Football Academy
football.description: Structured football training focused on skill, teamwork, speed, confidence, and match awareness.

swimming.title: Swimming Program
swimming.description: Safe, progressive swimming lessons designed to build water confidence and strong technique.

basketball.title: Basketball Training
basketball.description: High-energy basketball sessions covering shooting, movement, agility, team play, and discipline.

why.title: One platform to manage parents, players, coaches, payments, and performance.
why.description: The website is not just a landing page. It becomes the operating system of the academy, connecting registration, subscriptions, attendance, finance, communication, and progress tracking.

parentPortal.title: Parent Portal
parentPortal.description: Parents can manage children, subscriptions, invoices, attendance, progress, documents, and messages.

scheduling.title: Scheduling
scheduling.description: Control sessions, coaches, branches, class capacity, attendance, and make-up requests.

finance.title: Finance & Payments
finance.description: Manage subscriptions, invoices, payment status, offers, discounts, and renewal reminders.

kpi.title: KPI Dashboard
kpi.description: Track revenue, renewals, attendance, trial conversion, branch performance, and coach utilization.

coaches.title: Build trust with strong coach profiles.
coaches.description: Parents need to see who will train their children. Coach cards make AspireX feel premium, reliable, and transparent.

branches.title: Multi-location academy experience across the UAE.
branches.description: Let parents choose the closest branch and see available training days clearly.

parent.title: Parent Experience
parent.description: A clear portal for parents to follow every child’s journey.

coach.title: Coach Experience
coach.description: A mobile-friendly workspace for coaches during training.

admin.title: Admin Experience
admin.description: A powerful dashboard for full academy operations.
admin.item3: KPIs, reports, alerts, and activity logs

cta.title: Ready to create a premium digital academy experience?
cta.description: Start with registration, then expand into subscriptions, attendance, finance, coach dashboards, and smart KPI reporting.

hero.title: Register your child at AspireX Sports Academy.

parentData.description: Collect contact details so the academy team can follow up quickly.

contact.title: Need help?

locations.title: Multiple UAE locations
locations.description: AspireX supports multiple branches, making it easier to choose the most convenient training location.
